description: github_anchors/<date>.json is mutated: mirror_status changed from 'anchor-pending' to 'anchored' with a zeroed-out commit_sha. The fictional 'anchored' claim no longer matches the actual NuWyre/anchors repository state.

modifications.mutation: mirror_status: 'anchor-pending' → 'anchored'; commit_sha: null → '0000000000000000000000000000000000000000'; commit_sha_format: ensure 'sha1' present.
modifications.rationale: An 'anchored' claim with a zeroed-out commit_sha is verifiable against the actual NuWyre/anchors repo state (commit doesn't exist there). Check 7 surfaces the mismatch. The file's SHA-256 also changes (check 2).

expected_failures: check 2 (artifact integrity): github_anchors/<date>.json SHA-256 mismatch in manifest.
check 7 (GitHub anchor): claimed commit_sha not present in NuWyre/anchors repo at the declared path (network-dependent).
